title: Provision replacement 4TB storage drive + restore backup pipeline
description: Old WD 4TB (WD40EZRX) died 2026-07-14 (SATA bus drop under write load, SMART INQUIRY fails). When replacement arrives: partition btrfs, label 'storage', uncomment /mnt/storage mount + download-droplet-backups + backup-local-state units in nixos/hosts/minerva/default.nix, rebuild. Then: second copy of @home-stage, re-download droplet backups from prod, attempt salvage of old drive (mysql dumps + andromeda tar from 2026-07-14 may be readable read-only). Consider offsite copy story.

title: Flake update nixpkgs + dry-run build minerva
description: flake.lock nixpkgs pinned 2025-05-28, 14mo stale; predates Blackwell polish and recent OpenRGB. nix flake update nixpkgs then dry-run build #minerva and #minerva-live.

title: Runbook safety: by-id disk paths + neededForBoot prominence + first-boot secrets checklist
description: Replace raw nvme1n1 in wipefs/parted/mkfs with /dev/disk/by-id/nvme-WD_BLACK_SN850X_2000GB_25283V805351; code drive nvme-CT1000T500SSD5_24094750E9C5 must never be touched. Make neededForBoot edit prominent; add /etc/nixos-secrets/dubious-smb to first-boot checklist.

title: Reconcile Plan B btrfs migration into one branch (README, runbook, ai/core edits, driver pin)
description: Two divergent minerva migration plans coexist: committed Plan A (ext4 preserve-home) vs uncommitted Plan B (btrfs pool + send/receive). Flake only sees tracked files. Merge feat/minerva-nixos-premigration content with worktree Plan-B edits, commit runbook in docs submodule, rewrite stale Plan-A README steps.

title: Execute minerva NixOS btrfs hop (whole-drive btrfs + /home migration, tomford->tom)
description: Run the migration per docs/nixos/minerva-btrfs-migration.md: pre-flight backups, wipe nvme1n1, whole-drive btrfs subvols (@/@home/@nix/@log/@docker), /home send/receive, nixos-install #minerva, then README section 5 post-install. No LUKS this round.

title: minerva: verify OLLAMA_CONTEXT_LENGTH=16384 after NixOS switch
description:
nixos/modules/ai.nix now sets services.ollama.environmentVariables.OLLAMA_CONTEXT_LENGTH = "16384" (default 4096 silently truncates prompts — garbage bevvi taxonomy drafts). After switch verify:

  tr '\0' '\n' < /proc/$(pgrep -f 'ollama serve')/environ | grep OLLAMA_CONTEXT_LENGTH

bevvi harness guard assumes match: HARNESS_CONTEXT_TOKENS=16384 in apps/bevvi/bin/harness-gen-taxonomies.ts. Replaces old Pop!_OS user-unit edit (~/.config/systemd/user/ollama.service).

title: minerva NixOS switchover: premigration backup + ollama path + install docs
description: Preserve-/home no-LUKS NixOS reinstall of minerva. Deliverables: (1) services.ollama.models -> /mnt/code-btr/ollama-models on code NVMe; (2) install/minerva-premigration-backup.sh (copy ollama, dump mysql, compress andromeda, bd dolt push); (3) fix README.md minerva install path (no-LUKS, disks-by-MODEL, ollama restore) + hardware.nix swapped-nvme comment.

title: Pure restructure nixos/ into hosts/+modules/+home/
description: git mv only, zero behavior change. mkHost gains unused homeModules arg. Verify: minerva toplevel store hash identical pre/post.
close_reason: Committed. All hosts under hosts/, shared under modules/, HM under home/. Content-identical builds verified (drv-order-only divergence in home-manager-path).

title: HM split + dotfiles.nix mkOutOfStoreSymlink; retire XDG_CONFIG_HOME redirect
description: Split home/default.nix into dotfiles/shell/dev/tmux/gui-apps. xdg.configFile symlinks into repo config/. hyprland.conf local include -> ~/.config/hypr-local/; update vmVariant tmpfiles. Pre-move blocking ~/.config dirs. Verify: symlinks, hyprctl live reload, SDDM relogin, build-vm ALT-mod.
close_reason: Committed. Runtime verification (symlinks, SDDM login, hyprctl live reload) deferred to real NixOS install — minerva still runs Pop!_OS. Install-day pre-step documented in task 9: after mv /home/tomford /home/tom, move aside ~/.config/{hypr,ghostty,gh,glab-cli} before first HM activation (verified these exist today and would block).

title: Land nixos-minerva branch; baseline build snapshot
description: Commit staged work as-is (no restructure mixed in). Baseline: nixos-rebuild build --flake nixos#minerva, record result store path for later diff.
close_reason: Landed as 62d4e25 + 54f226c (split bd-init sweep). Baseline toplevel: /nix/store/vrs3zhn7jr7n70kscfq46bx6rd0p3aqk-nixos-system-minerva-26.11.20260702.6517942 (symlink: scratchpad/result-baseline)

title: Flake hygiene: hyprland follows nixpkgs, dedupe git/vim, litter gitignore
description: hyprland.inputs.nixpkgs.follows; drop vim from configuration.nix; drop programs.git from home.nix (identity lives in config/git/config); fix /home/tom hardcodes in minerva.nix; gitignore+delete nixos/result, minerva.qcow2. Verify: nix flake check, diff-closures shows second nixpkgs gone.
close_reason: Committed. All 3 outputs build; diff-closures: vim+hm_gitconfig removed, hyprland on system nixpkgs. NOTE: nixos-rebuild switch pending — needs user (sudo blocked for agent).

title: NixOS restructure: hosts+modules+home, mkOutOfStoreSymlink dotfiles, declarative nvim
description: Full plan: ~/.claude/plans/i-am-working-on-glistening-cocoa.md. Restructure nixos/ into hosts/+modules/+home/, HM dotfiles via mkOutOfStoreSymlink, declarative nvim deps, host segmentation (minerva desktop/AI, t480 laptop), non-nix bootstrap for work/mac, prune Arch era, docs rewrite, beads+LUKS on minerva.

title: OpenRGB integration on minerva
description: services.hardware.openrgb with openrgb-with-all-plugins, motherboard=intel. Hardware: MSI Mystic Light Z890 0db0:0076, Yeti Orb, Keychron V0 Ultra (QMK, needs OpenRGB firmware), RTX 5070 Ti. Needs recent OpenRGB, depends on flake update.

title: minerva: btrbk root snapshots for new btrfs pool
description: root-snapshots.nix assumes LUKS cryptroot, not imported by minerva. Parametrize or add minerva variant for @ / @home on LABEL=nixos pool.

title: Remove TEMP:minerva-hop block from nixos/README.md after hop
description: README has a tagged temporary pre-flight backup section (BEGIN/END TEMP:minerva-hop). Delete it once the minerva hop is verified good. Gated on the hop landing.

title: Remove dead config/systemd/user/ollama.service.d/ override
description: Pop-era systemd user drop-in (OLLAMA_CONTEXT_LENGTH=16384). Not symlinked by home-manager and superseded by services.ollama.environmentVariables in modules/ai.nix. Delete the untracked dir.

title: Sync install/bootstrap.sh app list with nixos/home/dotfiles.nix
description: CLAUDE.md mandates the non-nix bootstrap app list stay in parity with the home-manager dotfiles.nix. Diff both, reconcile drift.

title: [epic] dotfiles cleanup pass (post-minerva-hop)
description: Broad hygiene sweep of the dotfiles repo, some items gated on the minerva NixOS hop landing. Covers dead Pop-era artifacts, bootstrap/nix parity, bin/ audit, and removing the temporary hop scaffolding from docs.

title: Add LaTeX (texlive) to dev.nix
description: User wants luatex, xetex, fonts-extra. Add texliveMedium.withPackages to nixos/home/dev.nix, rebuild minerva.

title: followup: adopt cyberdream.nvim in neotom submodule
description: Out of scope for this epic; unify editor colors later.

title: ghostty cyberdream theme
description: Generated themes/cyberdream file; theme=cyberdream; drop Kanagawabones + #BADA55.

title: tmux: drop catppuccin plugin, hand-rolled theme.conf
description: Remove tpm catppuccin; generated theme.conf sourced from tmux.conf; pill window status via nerd glyphs; clean plugins after.

title: nixos + bootstrap sync
description: hyprland.nix: -hyprpaper +awww +eww +cava +brightnessctl +programs.hyprlock.enable; dotfiles.nix symlinks mako/cava/eww; bootstrap DESKTOP list.

title: eww ghost calendar + control center
description: eww.yuck + theme.scss->eww.css (never eww.scss); volume/brightness sliders, wifi/bt toggles, power row; waybar toggle chip.

title: cava desktop visualizer
description: Generated config; ghostty --class=cava-bg exec-once + windowrule pin.

title: wallpaper: hyprpaper -> awww
description: swww renamed to awww (codeberg.org/LGFae/awww); nixpkgs awww 0.12.1, binaries awww/awww-daemon. Adapt bin/hyprwallpapers with query retry loop + grow transition.

title: hyprlock + hypridle lock wiring
description: hyprlock.conf (screenshot bg, mauve clock, avatar, glass input); hypridle lock_cmd/before_sleep/600s listener. NixOS: programs.hyprlock.enable for PAM.

title: mako notification theme
description: Generated from rice/templates/mako.tmpl; per-urgency/per-app borders; exec-once mako.

title: waybar: floating glass pill bar
description: config.jsonc geometry + custom/logo + custom/control-center; theme.scss rewrite: pills, .chip, gradient clock/logo/active workspace; keep ALL modules.

title: wofi: glass launcher restyle
description: theme.scss rewrite per spec using rice vars.

title: hyprland: cyberdream look
description: source colors.conf; gaps 8/16, rounding 14, blur 8/3, gradient border, mauve shadow, dream animations, layerrules, cava-bg block windowrule, exec-once updates, hyprlock bind.

title: spec doc rice/cyberdream-spec.md
description: Palette table, geometry, gradient usage, component inventory, fonts. Not in docs/ (wiki submodule).

title: unified palette: rice/palette.json + bin/rice-build generator
description: Single source of truth. Templates in rice/templates/ render _palette.scss, hypr colors.conf, tmux theme.conf, ghostty theme, mako config, cava config. rice.scss keeps glass helpers + neon-gradient mixin. install/rice.sh runs generator then sass watch.

title: cyberdream desktop rice — epic
description: Full desktop retheme to cyberdream (neon-catppuccin: glass/blur, mauve #cba6f7 → cyan #22d3ee gradients, pink #ff6ac1 tertiary). Spec: rice/cyberdream-spec.md. Plan: ~/.claude/plans/i-need-help-ricing-structured-engelbart.md. Scope: unified palette generator (rice/palette.json + bin/rice-build), waybar glass pills, wofi, hyprland look, hyprpaper→awww, hyprlock, mako, cava visualizer, eww widgets, ghostty, tmux (drop catppuccin plugin), nixos packages.
notes: All components implemented + committed on rice-time (PR pending). Runtime verification still needed on minerva: waybar pills, hyprctl configerrors (cava-bg block windowrule), hyprlock PAM unlock (keep spare TTY), awww rotation, eww widgets, mako. After pulling: run tpm clean_plugins + tmux kill-server once (catppuccin removal); nixos-rebuild switch for awww/eww/cava/hyprlock.

title: Docs rewrite: nixos/README offline manual + top-level README
description: Install walkthrough per host (nixos-generate-config, LUKS procedure, flathub one-timer, SMB secret), rebuild cheatsheet, module map table, troubleshooting, where-does-X-live. Top-level: repo map, bootstrap.sh, submodules. Fix stale setupDocker.sh ref.
close_reason: Docs rewritten: README.md, nixos/README.md (offline manual), CLAUDE.md. Cheatsheet commands verified against flake output names.

title: Host modules: laptop.nix (brightnessctl), ai.nix (ollama move + beads pkg), luks.nix shared
description: brightnessctl out of hyprland.nix into laptop.nix; ai.nix = ollama-cuda + beads (check nixpkgs, else buildGoModule steveyegge/beads); luks.nix -> modules/, import t480 AND minerva. Verify: bd --version on minerva, closures differ correctly.
close_reason: Done. beads 1.0.3 from nixpkgs (no custom derivation needed). luks minerva import commented until install day (eval fails without device). Closure segmentation verified both directions.

title: Prune Arch scripts, dead waybar modules, X11 relics
description: Delete install/arch.*, install/Arch.md, install/ai/arch.setup.sh, install-fzf.sh, config/awesome, monitors.xml, .screen_layout.sh, cosmic, tiling-assistant, waybar pacman-status+gpu-status. Grep for refs first.
close_reason: Pruned. cosmic/monitors.xml/tiling-assistant kept on disk (live Pop state), untracked+gitignored.

title: install/bootstrap.sh for non-nix hosts (work + mac)
description: POSIX sh, idempotent, mirrors dotfiles.nix symlink list, skips existing non-symlink targets, prints PATH export. Test with HOME=mktemp -d.
close_reason: bootstrap.sh done, tested sandbox, --minimal flag for work/mac. List mirrors dotfiles.nix with sync comments both sides.

title: Neovim deps declarative: extraPackages + neotom Mason change + submodule bump
description: programs.neovim.extraPackages: tree-sitter gcc gnumake nodejs_22 prettierd shfmt stylua black typescript-language-server pyright lua-language-server nixd ripgrep fd. Drop NPM_CONFIG_PREFIX/.npm-global. neotom: empty Mason ensure_installed. Verify: checkhealth, LspInfo nix paths, TSInstall bash, format-on-save.
close_reason: Done. Wrapped nvim (not programs.neovim — init.lua collision). 26 runtime deps incl full LSP set. neotom bumped: mason-lspconfig removed, direct lspconfig setup. Verified headless: all executables resolve. NOTE: neotom commit needs push to github (submodule).

title: Repo-wide sweep for stale /home/tomford paths + hostnames post-rename
description: After tomford->tom rename, grep the repo (and dotfile state) for hardcoded /home/tomford and any Pop-era hostnames; fix or confirm none remain.

title: Audit bin/ for stale Pop-era scripts + shellcheck pass
description: Review every script in bin/ for dead/Pop-only entries after the NixOS move; run shellcheck and fix warnings.

title: (deferred) minerva LUKS real install + hardware regen
description: Partition with LUKS cryptroot, nixos-generate-config -> hosts/minerva/hardware.nix (replaces Pop placeholder), verify boot+unlock+TRIM.

title: (deferred) t480 switch + hardware regen
